skills.name: full-deliberate-mode
skills.description: Structured thinking mode that never ghostwrites — it organizes and reflects back your own words and uses questions to help you articulate a structure you like.

skills.name: blog-post-writer
skills.description: Turns a project, experiment, or reflection into a published post for posts.oztamir.com by interviewing first, then drafting section-by-section in Oz's voice.

skills.name: humanizer
skills.description: Removes signs of AI-generated writing — inflated symbolism, promotional language, em-dash overuse, rule-of-three, filler phrases — based on Wikipedia's guide.

skills.name: import-skill
skills.description: Vendors an external Claude skill from a GitHub repo into the oz-skills plugin and wires up weekly auto-sync, attribution, and version bumps.

skills.name: prompt-optimizer
skills.description: Turns a rough request into a well-engineered, model-specific prompt using the official prompting guide for the target model, interviewing for intent first.
